room.caption: [G2-GreatP1] So many horrible memories.
room.creationCode:

if global.gameProgress<=795 global.gameProgress=800
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4MainA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(205) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
